title: Model hybrid pricing with pricing plans
description: Charge your customers based on usage, recurring, or one-time fees.

steps.title: Set up customer
steps.description: Create a customer that you will subscribe to your pricing plan.

nodes.title: Create a customer
nodes.description: Create a customer to subscribe to the pricing plan.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

steps.title: Create Pricing Plan
steps.description: Create an empty Pricing Plan to serve as the container for your pricing model components.

nodes.title: Create an empty Pricing Plan
nodes.description: Create an empty Pricing Plan. We will later separately configure and attach billing components.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Create a meter
nodes.description: Create a meter to track usage events reported to Stripe.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

steps.title: Add a rate card
steps.description: Configure and attach a rate card component to the Pricing Plan to support usage-based billing.

nodes.title: Create a rate card
nodes.description: Create a rate card to manage usage-based billing with monthly service intervals.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Create a metered item
nodes.description: Create a metered item to link the meter to a billable item.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Add rate to rate card
nodes.description: Add rates to the rate card to define your usage-based prices.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Attach rate card to Pricing Plan
nodes.description: Attach the rate card to your Pricing Plan to complete the billing structure.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

steps.title: Add a license fee
steps.description: Configure and attach a license fee component to add a fixed recurring fee to the Pricing Plan.

nodes.title: Create a licensed item
nodes.description: Create a licensed item to represent the fixed component that will be billed.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Create a license fee
nodes.description: Create a license fee component to add a fixed monthly fee to the Pricing Plan.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Attach license fee to Pricing Plan
nodes.description: Attach the license fee to your Pricing Plan alongside the usage-based component.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

steps.title: Grant recurring credits through service actions
steps.description: Create a recurring credit grant service action to offer credits that can offset charges for specific billable items.

nodes.title: Create recurring credit grant service action
nodes.description: Create a service action that defines a recurring credit grant, specifying the amount, billing frequency, and applicable billable items.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Attach service action to Pricing Plan
nodes.description: Add the service action as a component to your Pricing Plan to link the recurring credit grant to the plan.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

steps.title: Subscribe customer to Pricing Plan
steps.description: Create a checkout session to subscribe the customer to the Pricing Plan.

nodes.title: Set live version to latest
nodes.description: Update the live version to "latest" so new subscriptions use the updated Pricing Plan.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Create checkout session
nodes.description: Create a checkout session to activate the Pricing Plan subscription.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Complete the checkout
nodes.description: Complete the hosted checkout page to complete the subscription flow.
nodes.review_prompt: Open the app and confirm the user-facing flow works as described.

nodes.title: Wait for servicing activated event
nodes.description: Wait for the pricing plan subscription to be activated for servicing.
nodes.review_prompt: Run the relevant Stripe CLI trigger or complete the upstream flow, then confirm the handler receives and verifies the expected event.
